{{Quote|Embarrassed by yellow tusks? Use sparkling TuskBlaster from GamorrCare.|HoloNet News advertisement|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''TuskBlaster''' was the name of a hygienic product developed by [[GamorrCare]]. The product was advertised toward [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] to aid them in eliminating embarrassing [[Color/Legends|yellow]] stains that would develop on their tusks. Advertisments for TuskBlaster ran in the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]]<ref name="HNN" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|46||HoloNet News Vol. 531 #46}} is set on the date 13:3:7, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
TuskBaster was mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 46|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #46'']], an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 7]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN46 date">Per {{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220914072556/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-4#post-6042498}}, [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #47]] was released on [[March 14]], [[2002]]. As [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] segments were published weekly, and {{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|jediwatch/1337_1.html|Jedi Refuse to Hand Over Baby Ludi}} was published in the issue immediately preceding the forty-seventh edition, it must have been released on [[March 7]] of the same year.</ref> The site's content was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
